1844690.name: Empire of Revenant
1844690.description:
The year is 2122. You are an officer cadet, a prestige position with a bright future in the Empire. One day, an unexpected patrol unraveled a threat that nobody prepared for. Entangled by shadowy interests and hidden agenda, will the conspiracy consume you first, or could you save the Empire and the one you loved?

Player could expect a feature-length film’s play time with inspiring story, beautiful art and handpicked music. “Empire of Revenant” is the first visual novel attempt by indie studio “Men of Letters”.
